body:
The purposes of this pull request are:

- Update the implementation of sparse EKI to make it compatible with the new version of DataContainer.
title: Address issue #113

body: Homogenizes the use of kwargs in the `update_ensemble!` call across Processes. The only two args are the EKP object and the forward model evaluations. The rest of the inputs are taken as kwargs.
title: Homogenize update_ensemble! kwargs.

body:
This version

- Fixes SparseInversion,
- Homogenizes update_ensemble! user facing kwargs.
title: Bump version
